summary: Optimize LOAD_FCT_TRADES stored procedure for faster nightly load
description: The nightly CTM_LOAD_FCT_TRADES job, which runs the ANALYTICS.MART.LOAD_FCT_TRADES stored procedure, has been getting slower as FCT_TRADES grows. The procedure inserts new staging trades using a `WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM FCT_TRADES ...)` anti-join, which re-scans the entire FCT_TRADES fact table on every run to dedup by TRADE_ID; this full scan dominates the runtime and is approaching the nightly batch window. Request a performance optimization of the procedure for Snowflake execution. Candidate approaches to evaluate (no behavior/output change): convert the INSERT...SELECT anti-join to an incremental MERGE or a Snowflake STREAM on STG_TRADES so only new staging rows are processed; add a clustering key or enable the Search Optimization Service on FCT_TRADES(TRADE_ID) to speed the dedup lookup; review warehouse sizing / query profile to right-size compute. This is a pure performance/cost improvement: the rows loaded, dimension key resolution, GROSS/NET calculations, and FCT_TRADES output must remain byte-for-byte identical. No new columns, tables, or business logic are requested.

triage.rationale: Performance optimization request for LOAD_FCT_TRADES sproc. The WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM FCT_TRADES ...) anti-join re-scans the entire fact table on every nightly run to dedup by TRADE_ID; this full table scan dominates runtime as FCT_TRADES grows and approaches batch window SLA. Request is for performance/cost improvement only—no behavior or output change requested. Candidate approaches: MERGE instead of INSERT...SELECT anti-join, Snowflake STREAM on STG_TRADES, clustering key or Search Optimization Service on FCT_TRADES(TRADE_ID), query profile review + warehouse sizing.

impacted_objects.name: LOAD_FCT_TRADES
impacted_objects.why: Named in summary; the procedure whose performance is being optimized. Currently uses WHERE NOT EXISTS dedup anti-join; candidate for MERGE or STREAM-based refresh.

impacted_objects.name: FCT_TRADES
impacted_objects.why: Fact table subject of full-table dedup scan in the anti-join. Candidates for optimization: add clustering key on TRADE_ID, enable Search Optimization Service (SOS), or migrate to STREAM-based change capture.

impacted_objects.name: STG_TRADES
impacted_objects.why: Source staging table for LOAD_FCT_TRADES. If STREAM-based approach is adopted, this becomes the source stream to track delta trades.

impacted_objects.name: CTM_LOAD_FCT_TRADES
impacted_objects.why: Control-M job that invokes LOAD_FCT_TRADES nightly. If optimization changes job runtime significantly, scheduling/window may need adjustment.

approval.notes: Spec re-authored in .github guided run; awaiting human go-ahead at the SME gate.
